ul.li: Persistence: Violations are written to WAL (Write-Ahead Log) before reporting.
Recovery: Chaos Controller implements an 'Auto-Heal' policy on exit to prevent infrastructure leaks.
Safety: Invariant Checker utilizes read-only RPCs; zero-side-effect guarantee on Target Cluster.
Timing: trigger_check latency must be < 50% of the tick interval to prevent drift.
Size: Average payload per check is ~256KB for a 5-node cluster state.
